fields.helpText: THIS ITEM CONTAINS TEXT TO BE DISPLAYED WITHIN VARIOUS LIST BOXES AND  COMBO BOXES WITHIN THE AD HOC REPORT SCREENS
This field uses a set of values to represent a boolean expression to  determine if this field may be used in data selections (filtering).
This field uses a set of values to represent a boolean expression to  indicate whether or not this field is part of a date range.
This field uses a set of values to represent a boolean expression to  indicate if this field may be printed.
This field uses a set of values to represent a boolean expression to  indicate if this field may be used as part of the sorting algorithm.
This value is used to assign a statistical weight to this field and is used to optimize both the the sorting process and the selection process.
This field uses a set of values to represent a boolean expression to  indicate that this field is a date.
Contains the file number which contains this field.
Contains the field number within the global of this field.
Contains the index name to use when working with this field in the  selection process.
